ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model being trained */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the training run */,
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameters used in the training run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the training run */,
  "resource_usage" TEXT /* Resource usage (e.g., CPU, GPU, memory) during the training run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES run_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_model_name FOREIGN KEY ("model_name") REFERENCES models ("model_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_hyperparam_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparam_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Number of the iteration within the training run */,
  "std_return" REAL /* Standard deviation of the return values */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return value */,
  "env_exec_time" REAL /* Execution time of the environment */,
  "policy_exec_time" REAL /* Execution time of the policy */,
  "mean_kl_before" REAL /* Mean Kullback-Leibler divergence before the iteration */,
  "itr_time" REAL /* Time taken for the iteration */,
  "loss_after" REAL /* Loss value after the iteration */,
  "num_trajectories" INTEGER /* Number of trajectories generated */,
  "average_discounted_return" REAL /* Average discounted return */,
  "mean_kl" REAL /* Mean Kullback-Leibler divergence after the iteration */,
  "time" REAL /* Total time elapsed */,
  "average_policy_std" REAL /* Average standard deviation of the policy */,
  "max_return" REAL /* Maximum return value */,
  "abs_learn_signal" REAL /* Absolute learning signal */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return value */,
  "d_loss" REAL /* Change in loss value */,
  "process_exec_time" REAL /* Execution time of the process */,
  "perplexity" REAL /* Perplexity */,
  "loss_before" REAL /* Loss value before the iteration */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy */,
  "iteration_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the iteration */,
  "resource_usage" TEXT /* Resource usage (e.g., CPU, GPU, memory) during the iteration */,
  "validation_metrics" TEXT /* Validation metrics for the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, model trainer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or event logged */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., environment, policy, model) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run */,
  "total_iterations" INTEGER /* Total number of iterations in the run */,
  "average_std_return" REAL /* Average standard deviation of return values */,
  "average_min_return" REAL /* Average minimum return value */,
  "average_env_exec_time" REAL /* Average environment execution time */,
  "average_policy_exec_time" REAL /* Average policy execution time */,
  "average_mean_kl_before" REAL /* Average mean Kullback-Leibler divergence before the run */,
  "average_loss_after" REAL /* Average loss value after the run */,
  "total_num_trajectories" INTEGER /* Total number of trajectories generated */,
  "average_average_discounted_return" REAL /* Average average discounted return */,
  "average_mean_kl" REAL /* Average mean Kullback-Leibler divergence after the run */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time elapsed for the run */,
  "average_average_policy_std" REAL /* Average average standard deviation of the policy */,
  "average_max_return" REAL /* Average maximum return value */,
  "average_abs_learn_signal" REAL /* Average absolute learning signal */,
  "average_explained_variance" REAL /* Average explained variance */,
  "average_average_return" REAL /* Average average return value */,
  "average_d_loss" REAL /* Average change in loss value */,
  "average_process_exec_time" REAL /* Average process execution time */,
  "average_perplexity" REAL /* Average perplexity */,
  "average_loss_before" REAL /* Average loss value before the run */,
  "average_entropy" REAL /* Average entropy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter set */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in the training */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in the training */,
  "num_layers" INTEGER /* Number of layers in the model */,
  "hidden_units" INTEGER /* Number of hidden units in each layer */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used in the training */,
  "activation_function" TEXT /* Activation function used in the training */,
  "momentum" REAL /* Momentum value for optimizers that use it */,
  "weight_decay" REAL /* Weight decay value for regularizers */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate for models with dropout layers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id")
)
